description:
Create an incident scenario on the Bologna Pasubio corridor by stopping a vehicle named 'incident_veh' on a standard traffic lane (excluding bus lanes or sidewalks) for 900 seconds, departing at simulation time 100. Using the scenario files in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/, configure and run two simulations: a base run and a run with dynamic rerouting enabled for all vehicles. Save the simulation configuration to /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_incident.sumocfg. Export the resulting trip data to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo_incident.xml and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo_rerouted.xml. Produce a comparison report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/impact_report.txt containing the average trip durations for both runs, formatted exactly as:
Base Average Duration: <X>
Rerouted Average Duration: <X>
Ensure values are rounded to two decimal places.
